description_long: This object consists of two swords embedded in a roughly spherical, gray stone. The first sword has a light-colored blade with a blue central ridge and a gold crossguard, featuring a stylized face or emblem on the blade near the hilt. The second sword has a darker blade with a black and red color scheme, including a red circular pattern along the blade and a black crossguard. The stone is irregular and textured, resembling natural rock, and serves as the base anchoring both swords upright. The swords are positioned at slight angles to each other, creating a dramatic, iconic display reminiscent of legendary sword-in-the-stone imagery. The materials and finishes of the swords contrast with the rough, matte surface of the stone.
description: Two ornate swords are embedded in a rough, gray stone, one with a gold and blue motif and the other with a black and red design. The stone is spherical and textured, anchoring the swords upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing both swords' hilts and decorative details, with the stone base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the stone and the profile of both sword blades and handles.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the backs of the sword hilts and the stone's surface texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, focusing on the alignment of the swords and the stone's rounded form.
attribute_handle_design: straight handles, one with gold and blue accents, the other black with red circular patterns, both with simple ergonomic shapes
attribute_ornamentation: stylized face/emblem on one blade, red circular pattern on the other blade
